description: Building educational software as a fullstack developer. Working with Flutter for cross-platform development and Ember.js for web applications in a hybrid team environment.
Consulted as a DevOps engineer across multiple client organizations. Completed intensive training in C#, Angular, Docker, Entity Framework, and secure programming.
Developed virtual screens in augmented reality on the Microsoft HoloLens 2 for remote office workers. Built with Unity3D, C#, UWP, and the Mixed Reality Toolkit (MRTK).
Developed software solutions at a communication technology company, gaining hands-on experience with professional development workflows and team collaboration.
Built cross-platform mobile applications using React Native during an internship at a digital agency in 's-Hertogenbosch.
Bachelor of Applied Science in Computer Software Engineering. Built a strong foundation in software architecture, web development, and agile project management.
